title: How a Godly Man Leads a Room by Being the First to Say He's Wrong
caption:
The room doesn't remember who was right. It remembers who moved first.

Leadership isn't the title you get handed. It's whoever's willing to eat the awkward silence, say the quiet thing out loud, take the shift nobody wants, and forgive before the apology ever shows up.

A godly man doesn't wait to be put in charge to start going first.

#faith #leadership #christianman #character #godlyman
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
